user.title: Shark IQ Login
user.description: Sign in with your SharkClean account. Tokens are persisted and auto-refreshed so you only need to do this once.

error.rate_limited: Login rate limited by SharkNinja (429). Wait a few minutes and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Shark/Ayla services.

abort.already_configured: This Shark account is already configured.
